metadata.note: Sample starter content; generate more with dndwright.content.generate.

traits: Resonant hum creates minor sonic pulses

narrative.description: Living statues composed of sentient quartz and volcanic glass. They process solar energy into kinetic force.
narrative.flavor: Born from the heat of the mantle, tempered by the light of the stars.

narrative.description: Avian-insectoid hybrids with slender frames and iridescent, hive-integrated consciousness. They excel at high-altitude navigation.
narrative.flavor: The wind is not merely a path, but the language they speak.

narrative.description: Slime-skinned beings with symbiotic fungal colonies living within their porous outer layers. They act as the immune system of the wetlands.
narrative.flavor: Where the water meets the rot, the Strider finds home.

narrative.description: Sentient gas clouds contained within intricate, self-forged brass shells. They are chroniclers of cosmic anomalies.
narrative.flavor: A flicker of starlight trapped in a cage of clockwork.

narrative.description: Subterranean mammals that communicate through rhythmic drumming against cave walls. They possess deep empathy for the tremors of the earth.
narrative.flavor: They hear the heartbeat of the world before it even begins to pulse.

traits: Chlorophyll stores allow for brief starvation

narrative.description: Bipedal plant-folk whose blood is essentially concentrated sap. They spend decades in deep meditation to gain ancestral knowledge.
narrative.flavor: Growth is slow, but the memory of the forest is eternal.
